1.description: A filter designed with a Vanilla+ aesthetic approach that doesn't overly editorialize.

2.description: A version of the eqN Filter that makes it so potions are always hidden at all filter levels.

3.description: A specialized version of the eqN Filter that adds a massive amount of LLD (Low Level Dueling) features.

4.description: A specialized version of the eqN Filter that removes all LLD (Low Level Dueling) features.
